sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'
import { Container } from '@mui/system'
import { CardContent, Card, Grid, Typography, CardActions, Button } from '@mui/material';
import appTheme from '../theme';

const Filter = () => {

  return (
        <>
           <Container fluid="true">
             <Grid ml="auto" mr="auto" mb="6rem" container spacing={0} >
                 <Grid item xs={6} sm={4} md={3} lg={2}>
                      <Card sx={{ minWidth: 120, mr: '10px', backgroundColor: appTheme.palette.primary }}>
                        <CardContent>
                          <Typography sx={{ fontSize: 14 }} color="text.secondary" gutterBottom>
                            Word of the Day
                          </Typography>
                          <Typography variant="h5" component="div">
                            beneoent
                          </Typography>
                          <Typography sx={{ mb: 1.5 }} color="text.secondary">
                            adjective
                          </Typography>
                          <Typography variant="body2">
                            well meaning and kindly.
                            {'"a benevolent smile"'}
                          </Typography>
                        </CardContent>
                        <CardActions>
                          <Button size="small">Learn More</Button>
                        </CardActions>
                      </Card>
                 </Grid>
                 <Grid item xs={6} sm={4} md={3} lg={2}>
                      <Card sx={{ minWidth: 100 }}>
                        <CardContent>
                          <Typography sx={{ fontSize: 14 }} color="text.secondary" gutterBottom>
                            Word of the Day
                          </Typography>
                          <Typography variant="h5" component="div">
                            beneoent
                          </Typography>
                          <Typography sx={{ mb: 1.5 }} color="text.secondary">
                            adjective
                          </Typography>
                          <Typography variant="body2">
                            well meaning and kindly.
                            {'"a benevolent smile"'}
                          </Typography>
                        </CardContent>
                        <CardActions>
                          <Button size="small">Learn More</Button>
                        </CardActions>
                      </Card>
                 </Grid>
             </Grid>
           </Container>
        </>
  )
}

export default Filter
